evals.prompt: We need to add notification preferences to the platform.
evals.expected_output: PRD with clear business objective, MoSCoW scope, Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, measurable success metrics
expectations: Business objective: problem + audience + why now
MoSCoW scope with explicit Won't-have list

evals.prompt: Prioritize: (1) dark mode, (2) bulk order export, (3) SSO login, (4) mobile app, (5) notification preferences. 2 engineers, 3 months.
evals.expected_output: Prioritized list with RICE or equivalent scoring, capacity constraint applied
expectations: Uses RICE or equivalent structured prioritization
